'''godhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnophobic|gymnophobic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnophobic|gymnophobic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| godhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:godhachithi|godhachithi]] || [[word:godhachiji|godhachiji]] || [[word:godhachishi|godhachishi]] || [[word:godhachiki|godhachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:godhachuthuthu|godhachuthuthu]] || [[word:godhachujuju|godhachujuju]] || [[word:godhachushushu|godhachushushu]] || [[word:godhachukuku|godhachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:godhachuthu|godhachuthu]] || [[word:godhachuju|godhachuju]] || [[word:godhachushu|godhachushu]] || [[word:godhachuku|godhachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:godhachufthuf|godhachufthuf]] || [[word:godhachufjuf|godhachufjuf]] || [[word:godhachufshuf|godhachufshuf]] || [[word:godhachufkuf|godhachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:godhachethe|godhachethe]] || [[word:godhacheje|godhacheje]] || [[word:godhacheshe|godhacheshe]] || [[word:godhacheke|godhacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:godhachothotho|godhachothotho]] || [[word:godhachojojo|godhachojojo]] || [[word:godhachoshosho|godhachoshosho]] || [[word:godhachokoko|godhachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:godhachotho|godhachotho]] || [[word:godhachojo|godhachojo]] || [[word:godhachosho|godhachosho]] || [[word:godhachoko|godhachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:godhachofthof|godhachofthof]] || [[word:godhachofjof|godhachofjof]] || [[word:godhachofshof|godhachofshof]] || [[word:godhachofkof|godhachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfthĂŻf|godhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfjĂŻf|godhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfshĂŻf|godhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfkĂŻf|godhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|godhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|godhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|godhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|godhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfthĂŻf|godhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfjĂŻf|godhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfshĂŻf|godhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfkĂŻf|godhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfthĂŻf|godhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfjĂŻf|godhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfshĂŻf|godhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:godhachĂŻfkĂŻf|godhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:godhachĂŠthĂŠ|godhachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:godhachĂŠjĂŠ|godhachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:godhachĂŠshĂŠ|godhachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:godhachĂŠkĂŠ|godhachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:godhachathatha|godhachathatha]] || [[word:godhachajaja|godhachajaja]] || [[word:godhachashasha|godhachashasha]] || [[word:godhachakaka|godhachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:godhachatha|godhachatha]] || [[word:godhachaja|godhachaja]] || [[word:godhachasha|godhachasha]] || [[word:godhachaka|godhachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:godhachafthaf|godhachafthaf]] || [[word:godhachafjaf|godhachafjaf]] || [[word:godhachafshaf|godhachafshaf]] || [[word:godhachafkaf|godhachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:godhachasha|godhachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:godhachshĂ«sha|godhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhachrosha|godhachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhachmusha|godhachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhachyasha|godhachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodhachnkshĂ«sha|gogodhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodhachnkrosha|gogodhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodhachnkmusha|gogodhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodhachnkyasha|gogodhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:godhadhachasha|godhadhachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:godhadhachshĂ«sha|godhadhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhadhachrosha|godhadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhadhachmusha|godhadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhadhachyasha|godhadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodhadhachnkshĂ«sha|gogodhadhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodhadhachnkrosha|gogodhadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodhadhachnkmusha|gogodhadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodhadhachnkyasha|gogodhadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gedhĂŠchasha|gedhĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gedhĂŠchshĂ«sha|gedhĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gedhĂŠchrosha|gedhĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gedhĂŠchmusha|gedhĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gedhĂŠchyasha|gedhĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gogedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogedhĂŠchnkrosha|gogedhĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogedhĂŠchnkmusha|gogedhĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogedhĂŠchnkyasha|gogedhĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:godhfachasha|godhfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:godhfachshĂ«sha|godhfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhfachrosha|godhfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhfachmusha|godhfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhfachyasha|godhfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodhfachnkshĂ«sha|gogodhfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodhfachnkrosha|gogodhfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodhfachnkmusha|gogodhfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodhfachnkyasha|gogodhfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
